title: 10 best herbal teas for knee pain
intro_desc: Herbal teas for knee pain are natural remedies made from various plant extracts that help alleviate knee discomfort and inflammation. They work by reducing pain, inflammation, and stiffness in the knee joint. The best herbal teas for knee pain include Curcuma longa, Zingiber officinale, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Achillea millefolium, Ginkgo biloba, Camellia sinensis, Equisetum arvense, Cinnamomum verum, Lavandula angustifolia, and Cinchona officinalis. If left untreated, knee pain can significantly impact daily life, limiting mobility, causing sleep disturbances, and affecting overall mental well-being, ultimately affecting one's ability to perform daily tasks and maintain a healthy lifestyle.
